_comment: NRB Macroeconomic Indicators — Update manually from NRB website (https://nrb.org.np)
_interbank_rate_note: NRB daily interbank rate %. Below 5=bullish (loose liquidity), Above 7=bearish.
_ccd_ratio_note: Credit-to-Core-Deposit ratio %. Above 80=banks can't lend (bearish), Below 70=lots of room (bullish).
_inflation_rate_note: CPI inflation % YoY. Sweet spot 3-5% (NRB target ~6%). Above 8=rate hike risk.
_remittance_growth_note: Remittance % YoY growth. Higher = more liquidity in Nepal = bullish. Above 10=strong.
_base_rate_note: NRB base rate %. Below 5=bullish cheap borrowing, Above 9=very tight.
_how_to_update: 1. Visit https://www.nrb.org.np → Publications → Current Macroeconomic Situation
2. Update interbank_rate: NRB daily money market rate
3. Update ccd_ratio: From quarterly banking supervision report
4. Update inflation_rate: From monthly CPI report
5. Update remittance_growth: From BOP/Remittance monthly report
6. Update base_rate: From NRB monetary policy / banking circulars
